title: Hiring Store Manager at Starbucks India

jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at Starbucks India
jsonLd.description:
Starbucks India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Ahmedabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Starbucks India:
Starbucks India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Starbucks India!
